description: Fix terminology issues identified in review: standardize 平臺->平台, fix 擴充套件 usage, correct 雲維運->雲端維運, and fix 分割槽鍵->partition key.
steps: Replace all occurrences of 平臺 with 平台 across content.zh-tw/ files
Fix 擴充套件 to appropriate terms based on context: 擴充功能 for IDE/browser extensions, 擴展/擴充 for verb usage
Fix 雲維運 to 雲端維運 in content.zh-tw/kiro-experience/openclaw.md
Fix 分割槽鍵 to partition key in content.zh-tw/kiro-intro/mcp.md
acceptance_criteria: No occurrences of 平臺 remain in content.zh-tw/
No occurrences of 擴充套件 remain in content.zh-tw/
雲維運 is replaced with 雲端維運 in openclaw.md
分割槽鍵 is replaced with partition key in mcp.md
verification: Run 'hugo --gc --minify' and confirm no build errors
